Annual % Change in housing prices over time.
Figure 17.2. Year-to-year changes in housing prices.
description: A bar chart showing year-to-year changes in housing prices from 2000 to 2010. Positive changes are represented by green bars, and negative changes (starting in 2009) are represented by red bars.

caption: Annual % Change
description: A line graph showing the annual percentage change in housing prices from January 1992 to May 2009, showing significant volatility and a sharp decline towards the end of the period.
